findings.title: Authentication Weaknesses Detected
findings.description: High risk identified in the authentication process, potentially exposing user accounts to unauthorized access due to insufficient security measures.
assumptions: Authentication mechanisms are not fully secure.

evidence.excerpt: Detected auth risk keywords in 3 source(s)

recommendations: Conduct a thorough security audit of the authentication flow.

metadata.mitigation: Implement stronger authentication measures and conduct a security audit.

findings.title: Checkout API Latency Risk
findings.description: The current checkout API latency exceeds the service level objective (SLO), which could lead to poor user experience and increased cart abandonment rates.
assumptions: Current API performance metrics are accurate.

evidence.excerpt: Checkout API latency exceeds the SLO

recommendations: Optimize the checkout API to meet the 500ms SLO.

metadata.mitigation: Optimize the checkout API to ensure compliance with performance standards.

findings.title: Mobile Checkout Crash Risk
findings.description: The checkout process crashes on mobile devices, which is critical for user trust and conversion rates.
assumptions: Mobile device compatibility issues are causing crashes.
recommendations: Resolve issues causing the checkout page to crash on mobile devices.

metadata.mitigation: Fix issues causing the checkout page to crash on mobile devices.

findings.title: Payment Processing Errors
findings.description: Issues causing payment processing errors where users are charged but the transaction shows as failed need to be investigated and fixed.
assumptions: Payment processing errors are affecting user trust.
recommendations: Investigate and fix payment processing errors.

metadata.mitigation: Resolve payment processing errors to ensure user trust.

findings.title: High Risk in Pricing Strategy
findings.description: Multiple detected risks related to pricing across various sources indicate potential vulnerabilities in QuickPay's pricing strategy.
assumptions: Pricing strategy may not align with market standards.

evidence.excerpt: Detected pricing risk keywords in 10 source(s)

recommendations: Review and strengthen the pricing strategy to mitigate risks.

metadata.mitigation: Review and strengthen the pricing strategy.

findings.title: Accessibility Compliance Gaps
findings.description: Accessibility risk identified, indicating potential non-compliance with WCAG AA standards.
assumptions: Accessibility features may not be fully implemented.
recommendations: Conduct an accessibility audit to ensure compliance with WCAG AA standards.

findings.title: Compliance Risk with Data Handling Policies
findings.description: Potential compliance risks identified regarding data handling policies, particularly concerning PII collection and retention.
assumptions: Data handling practices may not fully comply with established policies.
recommendations: Review data handling practices to ensure compliance with PII policies.

summary: Identified 7 risks (1 accessibility, 1 compliance, 1 mobile, 1 payment, 1 performance, 1 pricing, 1 security). 4 flagged as blockers. Risk gate: FAILED (4 blockers, 0 warnings).
